title: Recruitment Consultant (Talent Acquisition)
description:
Why Join MCI?

At MCI Career Services, we don’t just sell a service — we connect talents with opportunities and help clients build strong teams. If you love meeting people, enjoy closing deals, and want a career with uncapped earning potential, this role is for you.

  • Training provided

  • Commission-driven, high earning potential

  • Fast-paced & rewarding environment

  • Strong team support (BD + Talent Acquisition)

What You’ll Get (Benefits)

  • Monthly Sales Commission

  • Bi-yearly Increment Opportunity

  • Incentive Trip

  • Continuous learning, coaching & career development

  • Strong internal support from BD + TA team

About Us
MCI Career Services Pte Ltd is a trusted leader in recruitment and human resource solutions, specialising in permanent, contract and temporary placements, as well as outsourcing and HR/payroll services across multiple industries. As part of the MCI Group of Companies, we have grown to over 100 employees across Singapore and Malaysia and are proud recipients of multiple industry recognitions, including Enterprise 50 and HRM Asia awards.

What You’ll Do

End-to-End Recruitment

  • Screen applications and shortlist candidates based on job requirements

  • Coordinate and arrange interviews between candidates and clients

Candidate Engagement

  • Provide candidates with clear job information and timely updates

  • Ensure a positive recruitment journey and experience

Stakeholder Collaboration

  • Work closely with Business Development teams on hiring needs

  • Share recruitment best practices and selection guidance

Compliance & Reporting

  • Ensure recruitment activities comply with TAFEP and employment regulations

  • Maintain accurate recruitment records and reports

Employer Branding & Process Improvement

  • Collect feedback from candidates and new hires

  • Support improvements to recruitment processes and candidate experience

What We’re Looking For

  • Diploma (minimum), preferably in HR or Business

  • Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

  • Willingness to learn and grow in recruitment & sales environment

  • Results-driven with a mindset to achieve targets

  • Training provided for those new to recruitment

Applicants who possess relevant experience for the above responsibilities are most welcome to apply. If you do not possess the above experience, your application will still be considered on individual merits and you may be contacted for other opportunities.

Please submit your updated resume in MS Words format by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON or email the updated resume to miya@mci.com.sg

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you give consent to collection, use and disclosure of your personal data and/or resume by the company (or its agent) for the purpose of the processing and administration by the company relating to this job application.

https://www.mci.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/MCI-Job-Applicant-Data-Protection-Notice.pdf

Kuan Mei Yang

Registration Number: R24124509
